chunks.en: I use my phone every single day.
chunks.ja: 私は毎日スマホを使います。

chunks.en: The first thing I do is check the time.
chunks.ja: 最初にすることは時間を確認することです。

chunks.en: After that, I read my morning messages.
chunks.ja: その後、朝のメッセージを読みます。

chunks.en: The app I open the most is a chat app.
chunks.ja: いちばんよく開くアプリはチャットアプリです。

chunks.en: I also use maps when I go to work.
chunks.ja: 仕事に行くときは地図も使います。

chunks.en: I use my phone on the train every morning.
chunks.ja: 毎朝、電車の中でスマホを使います。

chunks.en: One thing I want to change is my screen time.
chunks.ja: 変えたいことの一つはスマホを見る時間です。

chunks.en: So I want to use my phone less at night.
chunks.ja: だから夜はスマホをもっと少なく使いたいです。

outline: Opening: I use my phone every day
Point 1: morning routine and top apps
Point 2: when and where I use it
Wrap-up: one thing I want to change

modelTalk.text: I use my phone a lot. Every morning I check the time first. Then I look at my messages. I open my chat app the most. I talk with my friends and family there. I also open my music app a lot. Sometimes I watch short videos too. I use my phone at home and on the train. I check it at work when I take a break. At night I use it in bed. That's the problem. I want to change one thing. I don't want to use my phone in bed. It's bad for my sleep. So I'll try to stop soon. Let's see how it goes.

chunks.en: I use my phone every single day.
chunks.ja: 私は毎日スマホを使っています。

chunks.en: The first thing I do is check the time.
chunks.ja: 最初にすることは時間を確認することです。

chunks.en: In the morning, I read my news app first.
chunks.ja: 朝は、まずニュースアプリを読みます。

chunks.en: The app I open the most is a chat app.
chunks.ja: いちばんよく開くアプリはチャットアプリです。

chunks.en: I use my phone on the train to work.
chunks.ja: 通勤の電車の中でスマホを使います。

chunks.en: At night, I watch short videos in bed.
chunks.ja: 夜はベッドで短い動画を見ます。

chunks.en: One thing I want to change is less screen time.
chunks.ja: 変えたいことは、画面を見る時間を減らすことです。

outline: Opening: I use my phone every day
Point 1: morning routine and most-used apps
Point 2: when and where I use it
Wrap-up: one thing I want to change

modelTalk.text: I want to tell you about my phone. Every morning, I wake up and I check my phone. First, I look at the time. Then I read new messages from my friends. I open the same apps a lot. I use a chat app and a video app. I like music apps too. I use my phone at home and on the train. Sometimes I use it in bed at night. That's not good, I know. I want to change one thing. I want to look at my phone less. It's hard, but I'll try. Maybe I can put it down after dinner. That's my simple plan.
